title: Quick-Fix Brazilian Chorizo Wrap
description: A rich, chewy quick-fix dish featuring tomato juice and grill-fried chorizo for a low-sodium-friendly lunch option.

ingredients.name: 1 wrap
ingredients.notes: Whole wheat or any preferred type

ingredients.name: 2 slices of low-sodium ham
ingredients.notes: Use turkey or chicken if vegetarian option is needed

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp tomato juice concentrate
ingredients.notes: Water can be added for diluted version

instructions: Preheat grill or pan to medium-high heat.
Slice chorizo into thin rounds. Season with salt and pepper lightly.
Lightly toast wrap in a toaster oven or on a skillet until warm.
Place sliced chorizo, red onion, chopped tomatoes, and tomato juice concentrate on the bottom half of the wrap.
If using ham, place it on top of the fillings. Add any additional desired toppings like avocado slices or lettuce.
Fold the top half of the wrap over the fillings to seal.
Place wrapped sandwich on grill for 2-3 minutes per side, until heated through and slightly crispy on outside.
Lime-slice ends (optional) to serve immediately with a squeeze of fresh lime juice over the top.
